creator: marcel@scc.nl
text:
Building KDE 1.0 from /usr/ports/x11/kde fails on kdegraphics (IIRC).
Configure is unable to find libgif, which is part of kdesupport.
Kdesupport has been build, but did not build and install the library.

Fix: 

Manually installing libgif from the kdesupport:
% cd /usr/ports/converters/kdesupport/work/kdesupport-1.0/giflib30
% make install
How-To-Repeat: type 'make' again :-)
